content:
✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: Clock Tower ...
The exercise can be done in 5 min or less. I think it is original  and interesting enough. Can we assume that coders know what the average is? Some of these guys are not that good at math.

Capitalize the first word in a sentence!
Space after a comma.
Write out small numbers. 
our stub generator lacks output.
Just generally check your grammar.

Thank you for the feedback, i have added the output for the stub generator and added an extra info for what an average is.
I am sorry if the grammar is bad since english is kinda my third language but i did the things you told me about the capitalisation and spaces.

if there are any things i left or i need to add please inform me about it
